reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 역시 빠른 배송! 오자마자 뜯어서 저희집강쥐 줫는데 뽀시락뽀시락 잘 갖고 노네요! 생각보다 단단한 천인거같규 맘에 들어오~ 더 좋은 제품 마니 내주세용!!🙃🙂🙃🙂
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping as always! My hamster loved it right out of the box—he's been playing with it so happily! 🙃🙂🙃🙂 The fabric is sturdier than I expected, which I really like~ Please keep making more great products!!

reviews.name: 뭉****
reviews.content:
우리집 멈머 젤리가 좋아해요❤️
터그 장난감 좋아하고 바스락 소리 좋아하는데
같이 들어가 있어 더 좋아하는 것 같아요~
한참 이가 간지러워 물고 뜯고 열심히 하고있어용
디자인도 예쁘고 애기들도 좋아하고 만족해요!
reviews.content_en: My Mommer loves the jelly! ❤️ She loves tug toys and crinkly sounds, and having both together in one toy makes her love it even more~ She's been chewing and tugging away because her teeth are itchy right now. The design is pretty, the pups love it, and I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 벌써 3개째 구매입니다. 타 사이트에서 정가 구입했지만, 여긴서 행사가로 구입했습니다. 배변패드 구입시 같이 사면 배송비도 없고 좋습니다. 이가 작고 힘없는 소형견들 갖고 놀기 특히 좋습니다. 장난감도 많은데, 특히 이걸 좋아하네요. 이 장난감이 사라질까봐 걱정입니다. 쭈~욱 만들어 주세요~~
reviews.content_en: This is my 3rd purchase already. I bought it at full price on other sites, but got it on sale here. It's great that there's no shipping fee when you buy it together with pee pads. It's especially perfect for small dogs with weak teeth. There are lots of toys, but this one is their favorite. I'm worried this toy might disappear—please keep making it forever~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 장난감중에 진짜 단연 최고에요! 선물도 여러번 했어요! 우리 강아지도 최애 장난감인데 지인도 최애 장난감이래요. 삑삑이, 바스릭, 로프로 애들이 좋아할 만한 건 다 갖추고 있어요. 선물하느랴 몇번째 재구매를 한지 모르겠어요. 올때마다 로프실 길이는 약간 차이나고 처음에는 탄턴했는데 뭔가 몰랑 몰랑 해졌어요 강추입니다! 단종되면 안되요!!!
reviews.content_en: Honestly, this is the BEST toy out of all of them! I've given it as a gift multiple times! It's my dog's favorite toy, and my friends' dogs love it too! It has everything dogs could want—squeakers, crinkle sounds, and rope. I've repurchased it so many times I've lost count. Each time it comes the rope length varies a bit, and it started off stiff but became softer somehow. Highly recommended! It absolutely cannot be discontinued!!!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 더현대 5층 매장에서 본 장난감인데 저희 댕댕이가 너무 좋아했어요 당시는 테스터 외 재고가 없어 사지 못하고 온라인으로 주문했어요 일단 터깅,바스락,삑삑 모두 있어 좋고, 특히 삑삑이가 타 장난감대비 소리가 작아요👍 👍 삑삑이를 좋아하는 댕댕이 옆에서 놀고있음 솔직히 귀 좀 아픈데 이건 편안합니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I saw this toy at the Dae Hyundai 5th floor store and my pup loved it so much! At the time there was only a tester in stock, so I ordered it online instead. It's great because it has tugging, crinkling, and squeaking all in one, and especially the squeaker has a quieter sound compared to other toys 👍👍 Honestly, I love squeaker toys but they can hurt my ears—this one is so much more comfortable. ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 치약 디자인 넘 귀엽고 예뻐오 소형견한테 딱이네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The toothpaste design is so cute and pretty! Perfect for small dogs. ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 우선적으로 수도권에서 꽤 거리가 있는 지역에 사는데도 다른곳들에 비해서 배송이 정말 빨라서 놀랐어요. 1.5일도 안걸린듯한 칼배송 ㅎㅎㅎ 아침일찍 받아 저희집 막내한테 줬더니 눈도 제대로 못뜬채로 물고씹고 무아지경입니다. ㅋㅋㅋ 삑삑이 바스락 터그 다 가능한 장난감이라 딱이예요 🙈🤍 근데 제가 생각했던 크기보다는 작아서 조금 놀랐어요! (성인 손에 딱 들어올만한 크기) 그래도 저희 강아지한텐 잘 맞는 크기네요 ㅎㅎ 지인분 강아지한테도 줄겸 두개 같이 샀어요 🥰
reviews.content_en: First of all, I was surprised by how fast the shipping is even though I live quite far from the Seoul metropolitan area—it arrived in less than 1.5 days! 😄 I gave it to my youngest pup this morning and he's been chewing and playing with it non-stop without even properly opening his eyes. ㅋㅋㅋ It's perfect because it has squeakers, crinkle sounds, and tug capabilities all in one! 🙈🤍 But I was a bit surprised it was smaller than I expected (fits perfectly in an adult's hand)! Still, it's the right size for my dog. ㅎㅎ I bought two—one for my dog and one to give to a friend's dog. 🥰

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 혼자서도 잘 갖고 놀아요. 중형견 2마리 키우는 집이라 장난감이나 인형이 금방 망가지는 편인데 치약 터그는 오래가네요. 터그도 되고 바스락 소리도 나서 더 잘 가지고 노는 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: He plays with it well on his own. Since we have two medium-sized dogs, toys and plushies usually break quickly, but this toothpaste tug toy lasts a long time. It works as a tug toy and has a crinkle sound, so he loves playing with it even more.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
이갈이 시기라 터그 장난감 필요해서 주문했어요! 넘 귀엽고 제 취향이네요!!ㅋㅋ 근데 다행히 아기가 너무 좋아해서 기분좋네요
터그 장난감 더 많이 만들어주세요!
reviews.content_en: Ordered this because my pup is teething and needs a tug toy! It's so cute and totally my style!! ㅋㅋ And luckily my baby loves it, so I'm so happy~ Please make more tug toys!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
실로된 장난감을 좋아하는데 삑삑 소리도 나서 더 좋은 것 같아요
그리고 장난감이 너무 귀여워요!
reviews.content_en: I like rope toys, and this one is even better because it has a squeaker sound too! And the toy is absolutely adorable!

reviews.name: 혜****
reviews.content: 아이가 로프 가지고 노는 걸 좋아해서 사줬는데 오자마자 너무 잘 가지고 놀았어요! 아직 4개월도 안된 아가라서 덩치가 작은 편인데 장난감 사이즈가 너무 크지 않아서 가지고 놀기 딱 좋네요ㅎㅎ 치약 부분도 납작해서 쪼꼬만한 입으로도 잘 물고 놀 수 있어요! 열심히 가지고 놀다가 너덜너덜해지면 다시 구매하러 올게요😊
reviews.content_en: My pup loves playing with rope toys, so I got this for her and she's been absolutely loving it since it arrived! She's not even 4 months old yet and still pretty small, so the toy size is perfect—not too big at all haha. The toothpaste part is also flat, so even with her tiny mouth she can grab and play with it really well! Once it gets all worn and frayed from playing with it so much, I'll definitely be back to buy another one 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
출시 됐을 때부터 마음에 들었는데 조금 비싼감이 없잖아 있어서 안 사고 있다가 반값 하길래 샀어요
우리 할매가 너모 좋대요
겁나 지켜요
자다가도 대뜸 일어나서 킁킁 찾더니 아예 베개 마냥 베고 주무시네요
자기꺼다 그거져 참나
맘에 쏙 들어 하시니 사다드린 보람이 있어요
실 부분 아주 튼튼해서 씹는 장난감 좋아하는 아이들한테 찰떡입니다
reviews.content_en: I've liked this since it came out, but it was a bit pricey so I wasn't buying it until it went on sale for half off. My grandma absolutely loves it! She's so protective of it—she even wakes up out of a dead sleep to sniff around looking for it, and now she just cuddles up to it like a pillow when she sleeps 😄 She really thinks it's hers! I'm so glad I got it for her since she loves it so much. The string part is super durable too, so it's perfect for dogs that love to chew on toys!

reviews.content: 이것저것 다른장난감들 마니 사줬지만 결국 최애장난감은 바잇미인거같아요 물고 뜯고해도 튼튼해서 항상 구매한답니다 이번 장난감도 성공
reviews.content_en: I've bought all kinds of other toys, but it seems like BITE ME is our pup's ultimate favorite toy 🐾 It holds up so well even with all the biting and tugging, so we always come back to buy this one. This toy is another success!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 우리애기 최애 장난감 3살인데 지금까지 3개 해먹엇어요 너무너무 좋은 치약장남감
reviews.content_en: This is our baby's favorite toy! She's 3 years old and we've already gone through 3 of these. Such an amazing toothpaste toy for dogs!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아주 로프 너무 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: My pup really, really loves the rope haha. She plays with it so well!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 저희 아이가 처음 받자마자 너무 좋아해서 갖고 애견 운동장을 갔는데 거기서 같이 놀던 자이언트 푸들 친구가 보호자랑 터그놀이를 하다가 작살 내버렸어요.. 저희 아이가 좋아해서 뿌듯했는데 새로 사주려구요😅
reviews.content_en: My pup loved it so much right when she got it that I took her to the dog park to play with it, and there was this giant poodle friend there who was doing a tug-of-war game with her owner and totally destroyed it 😅 I was so proud that my pup loved it, but now I'm planning to get her a new one!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 삑삑이도, 바스락도, 터그놀이도 가능한 바잇미 치카치카 치약 치실로프 장난감💙 금방 실증내는 보리 공주님이 엄청 관심가지는 것만으로도 성공이에요ㅎㅎ 함께 챙겨주신 미니 간식두 감사합니다!
reviews.content_en: BITE ME toothpaste chew floss rope toy that has a squeaker, crinkly sounds, and tug-of-war play capabilities 💙 Our Bori princess usually gets bored of toys quickly, but just the fact that she's showing so much interest in this one is a win for us haha. Thank you also for including the mini treats!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 처음에 사준거는 이미 매듭이 다 풀려버릴정도로 잘 갖고 놀아서 하나 더 사줬더니 한번 풀어봤다고 벌써 매듭이 망가졌네요,,ㅎ 그래도 아가가 너무 좋아해서 자꾸 사주고 싶어요💙
reviews.content_en: The first one I bought got played with so much that all the knots completely came undone, so I got another one. This time she managed to loosen the knots and mess them up right away 😅 But she loves it so much that I keep wanting to buy her more 💙

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 실이 약간 탄탄한? 처음엔ㅋㅋ 안에 쇠가 들었나했어요ㅎ 기존에 다른 로프타입과 다른 탄탄함이 있네요ㅎㅎ 이갈이 중이라 구입했습니다ㅎ 덜렁 거리는 이빨에 로프타입으로 터그놀이 하니까 쏙쏙 유치가 빠져요ㅎㅎ 장난감 너무 귀엽고 짱짱합니다!
reviews.content_en: The string is a bit firm/sturdy? At first I honestly wondered if there was metal inside haha. It definitely has a different level of firmness compared to other rope toys I've had before 😄 I got this one because she's teething. The rope toy is perfect for playing tug-of-war with her wiggly baby teeth, and her baby teeth are coming out so nicely haha. The toy is super cute and super durable!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 로프에 바스락에 삑삑이까지 유솜 사랑하는 총집합인데요..?  로프에서 실이 넘 마니 떨어지는게 아쉬워용..
reviews.content_en: Yosom loves everything about this toy - the rope, the crinkly sound, AND the squeaker all together..? 😍 My only wish is that the rope doesn't shed so many threads 🥺

reviews.name: 짱****
reviews.content:
이미 한 번 사서 가지고 놀다가
너무 가지규 놀아서 다 망가져서 다시 사준거에요
당연히 넘 만족합니당
reviews.content_en: We already bought this once and my pup played with it so much that it got completely destroyed, so we bought it again! Definitely super satisfied with it 💯

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르구 아이가 넘 조아하네요~ 삑삑이에 로프 같이달린거 찾고있었는데 디자인 귀엽구 딱입니다!
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and my pup loves it so much~ I was looking for something with both a squeaker and rope attached, and the design is adorable and perfect! 😊

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 구름이가 너무너무 좋아해요!지금까지 사준 장난감중에 가장 좋아해요 내구성은 좀 아쉽네요ㅜㅠ 가지고논지 반나절만에 인형이 뜯어졌어요
reviews.content_en: Gureumi absolutely loves it! It's the favorite toy out of everything we've bought so far 🥰 The durability is a bit disappointing though ㅜㅠ The stuffing came out within half a day of playing with it

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 아가때 제일 좋아하던 장난감이라. 완전 난리기 나서 새걸로 하나 또 주문했어요
reviews.content_en: This was my pup's favorite toy when he was little, so he went absolutely crazy when he saw it! I ordered a new one for him 😄

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
너무너무 귀여워요.
3개월안된 아가가 물고 가니 어찌나 귀여운지..ㅋ
여기 장난감과 제품 진짜 좋은거 같아요.
자주 애용할게유~~%^
reviews.content_en: It's SO cute! 🥰 My pup who's not even 3 months old keeps biting it - it's just the cutest thing ㅋㅋ The toys and products here are really high quality. I'll definitely keep using this place~~♡

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아하는데 로프 끝을 뜯어서 실을 먹네요 🥲
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much, but he keeps tearing at the end of the rope and eating the strings 🥲

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 좋아해서 두번째 구매해요 ! 잘놀아요 진짜
reviews.content_en: I'm buying this for the second time because my pup loves it so much! He really plays with it well, seriously 😊

reviews.name: 염****
reviews.content: 이갈이 쫍쫍이 터그까지 다 만족하는 장난감
reviews.content_en: This toy satisfies everything - teething, chewing, and tug of war!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
항상 바잇미 장난감 너무 잘 이용하고 있어요🥰
역시나 아주 재밋게 잘 가지고 놀아요! 다른장난감도 몇개 더 구매하려고 합니당
reviews.content_en: I'm always so happy using BITE ME toys 🥰 Just as expected, my pup really enjoys playing with it! I'm planning to buy a few more toys from you guys 💕

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 요즘 최애장난감이 되었어요
reviews.content_en: It's become my dog's favorite toy lately!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
3가지가 한번에 있는 아주 좋은 장난감!
바스락으로 혼자 잘 가지고 놀고
작은 삑삑이와 터그놀이까지 가능해서 완벽해요👍
reviews.content_en: Such a great toy with 3 features all in one! My dog plays well with the crinkle sound on their own, and it's perfect because we can also do tug games with the small squeaker 👍

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지가 넘 좋아해요❤️
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves it ❤️

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content:
터그놀이랑 삑삑이 같이 있어서
놀아주기 너무 좋네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so convenient for playtime because it has both the tug toy and squeaker together haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 긴 장난감을 좋아해서 샀는데 진짜 치약같아요 귀여워ㅛ요
reviews.content_en: I bought it because my dog likes long toys, and it's seriously adorable like a toothpaste tube 😄

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 튼튼하고 좋아요. 터그놀이 열심히 해줘야겠어요
reviews.content_en: It's durable and great. I'll have to play tug games with it more often

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 깜찍하고 이뻐서 사줬는데 진짜 젛아하고 잘 갖고 놀아요 근데 치아힘이 좋은지 로프를 빼버렸네요 ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: I got it because it's so cute and pretty, and my dog really loves it and plays with it well, but their teeth are so strong that they pulled out the rope 😭😭

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 디자인 귀엽고 강아지가 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: The design is cute and my dog loves it

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
이거 원래이런가요
털실오라기 잡는대로빠지는데
이게 울강아지가 먹을수있다고생각하니
많이찝찝하네요
reviews.content_en: Is this normal? The thread keeps coming out as soon as I grab it, and thinking that my dog could eat it makes me really uncomfortable

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
원래 쓰던 장난감이 터져서 새로 알아보고 구매해보았는데
저희 강아지가 너무너무 좋아합니다!
reviews.content_en: My previous toy broke, so I looked around and bought this one, and my dog loves it so much!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 여러개 더 구매하려구요ㅋㅋㅋ 미친듯이 뜯고 놀아서 구멍나고 난리났어요ㅋㅋㅋ 너무 좋아ㅎㅐ요
reviews.content_en: I'm gonna buy more of these lol 😂 My pup is shredding it like crazy and it's already getting holes everywhere lol But they love it so much ❤️

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 주자마자 잘갖고놀아요 ㅎㅎ 바스락 소리도나고 터그놀이도가능하고 잘사준거같아요
reviews.content_en: They start playing with it right away ㅎㅎ It makes crinkly sounds and you can play tug-of-war with it too—definitely a good buy!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이제 2개월 반 된 푸들 아가가 너무너무 좋아해요
혼자서 신나서 난리납니다
reviews.content_en: My 2.5-month-old poodle puppy absolutely loves it 🥰 They get so excited and go wild playing with it by themselves

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 터그놀아 하기도 좋고 혼자서도 끈 부분 잘 가지고 오래 놉니다
reviews.content_en: It's great for tug-of-war and even when they play alone they hold the rope part and play with it for ages

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저희 집 강아지가 엄청 좋아하네요:)
reviews.content_en: My dog at home loves it so much :)

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 끈이 달려있어서 좋아하는 거 같아요~
reviews.content_en: I think they like it because of the rope attached to it~

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 저거만 잡고 무아지경입니다
reviews.content_en: Once they grab this toy, they're in their own world

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 왜 이제서야 사준거니 ㅜ0ㅜ  뜯자마자 자기꺼라구 빨리 달라고 하고 ㅋㅋ 위풍당당한 모습 ㅋㅋㅋ "나 치카치카 장난감 있는 말티야~~"  너무 좋아해요.. 진짜 재질이나 사이즈 디자인 모두 만족합니다. 바잇미 상품들은 진짜 패키지가 대박...ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Why did you wait so long to get this?? 😭 The second I gave it to them they claimed it as theirs and wanted to keep it lol Such a confident look 😂😂 'I'm a Maltese with a CHIKA CHIKA toy!!' They love it so much.. I'm honestly satisfied with everything—the material, size, and design. BITE ME products really have amazing packaging lol

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 잘 가지고 놈 내가 사기만 하면 행사함 열받아 ㅠ
reviews.content_en: They play with it well but as soon as I buy something they lose interest ugh 😤

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 이빨때문에 구매했는데 잘 가지고놀아요!
reviews.content_en: I got it for their teething but they really enjoy playing with it!
